Blueprint: a profinite presentation of the absolute Galois group of ℚ₂

Blueprint: a profinite presentation of the absolute Galois group of ℚ₂

Table of Contents
1.Foundational inputs
2.Introduction and main theorem
3.The candidate as a profinite group
4.The tame and maximal pro-2 quotients
5.The common tamepro-2 boundary and the global induction
6.Linear lifting theory and duality
7.Quadratic determinant obstructions
8.A minimal non-scalar module layer in the wild kernel
9.Central covers, affine fibres, and Fourier inversion
10.Proof of the boundary-framed theorem
11.Passage to all finite quotients
